query: SELECT tier, rarity, COUNT(*) as cnt, AVG(power_percent) as avg_pow, AVG(mp_cost) as avg_mp, AVG(cooldown) as avg_cd, AVG(shop_price) as avg_price FROM game_skill_catalog WHERE is_active = 1 GROUP BY tier, rarity
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user PS8xt1zjvuRpYHF.3bd331015af6 --database MLF7bLVZzzxdGTPVXTct3c --execute SELECT tier, rarity, COUNT(*) as cnt, AVG(power_percent) as avg_pow, AVG(mp_cost) as avg_mp, AVG(cooldown) as avg_cd, AVG(shop_price) as avg_price FROM game_skill_catalog WHERE is_active = 1 GROUP BY tier, rarity
